## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets `dev`.
- [ ] The branch is synced with the latest `dev`.
- [ ] The change is small, focused, and avoids unrelated refactors.
- [ ] User-visible UI copy is in `apps/desktop-ui/src/i18n/en.json`.
- [ ] Theme colors use existing tokens or update every theme JSON file.
- [ ] IPC changes update `wiki/IPC-Protocol.md`, `wiki/AI-CAD-Command-Language.md`,
      and `protocol/schema/*`.
- [ ] New geometry references follow the TNP rule: re-resolve against live
      shapes on recompute and degrade with `dependency_broken` on failure.
- [ ] Documentation changes update `wiki/` first and mirror where required.
